_comment: Hand-maintained skill-source corrections (P5; provenance §4.1). RECOMPUTED 2026-06-12 after the event-skill derivation v2 (Tachyons-lab union): the generator now classifies chain choices, date events and direct grants automatically, so the only residual disagreement is the bond-line 'special' events on friend/group cards (Tachyons-lab all_events.special_events; GameTora category 'special') — those skills appear only in the master flat eventSkills list, default to 'random_event', and are re-typed to 'date_event' here because they come from the same outing/bond track as date events. Each entry cites its Tachyons-lab special event (pin 2ce0c8fe). The build-time oracle (assertTachyonsParity, scripts/build-cards.ts) fails the build if a special-event skill ever goes missing instead of merely mis-typed, so this file can no longer drift silently. Verified residual-only by recompute: every other master-flat/GameTora/Tachyons disagreement is resolved by the generator's chain > date_event > random_event precedence.

10021._comment: Tazuna Hayakawa R [Tracen Academy] — Tail Held High 201611 from bond special 'A Bond with Tazuna: Aspirations Entrusted'.
